case_title: SALADA VENTURES, INC. VS. ALEX HWU

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED AUG-26-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HWU, ALEX

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SALADA VENTURES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEPHANIE ROBBINS, OWNER. DEFENDANT ALEX HWU IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $580.00 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT MADE A PAYMENT OF $580.00 VIA CREDIT CARD IN THE COURT HALLWAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $581.92 FILED BY SALADA VENTURES, INC. DBA BUDGET BLINDS OF SF WEST & SOUTHWEST AS TO DEFENDANT HWU, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEPHANIE ROBBINS, OWNER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALADA VENTURES, INC. DBA BUDGET BLINDS OF SF WEST & SOUTHWEST
